overall.description: A cinematic drive through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, beginning with a daytime desert overlook of the floating spaceport, transitioning through dusk residential streets, and continuing through neon-lit downtown highways and the Little China district at night.

futuristic cityscape with tall towers visible in the distance
paved two-lane road cutting through arid desert terrain

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a bright desert day with a view of Night City in the distance. A massive floating spaceport structure hovers in the sky above the city skyline as the camera drives along a desert road.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a residential area at sunset, with palm trees lining the streets and warm orange light bathing the suburban architecture. The desert landscape gives way to developed neighborhoods.

vehicle makes a right turn around a curved modern glass building

tall glass and steel office towers with teal interior lighting

segments.scene_description: Night falls as the camera enters a corporate plaza with modern glass buildings illuminated by teal and white lights. The vehicle follows a red sports car through the plaza before making a right turn around a curved glass building.

multi-lane raised highway with concrete barriers

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to an elevated highway cutting through the downtown area, with the prominent Watson Whore billboard visible on the left. The camera passes under multiple overpasses surrounded by dense neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown street canyon with towering billboards

entered.detail: purple neon sign with Japanese characters and TENGU text
tall buildings covered in dense neon signage and advertisements
multi-lane road surrounded by towering structures on both sides
large digital screens displaying various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dense downtown street canyon where towering buildings covered in neon advertisements line both sides. The Tengu billboard is visible on the left as the vehicle navigates through moderate traffic surrounded by massive digital screens.

scene_state.functional_zone: underpass leading to Little China district

segments.scene_description: The vehicle approaches the Little China district, passing under a covered underpass with the district sign visible. Emerging from the underpass, the scene is characterized by distinctive green neon lighting on the buildings, marking the transition to this specific neighborhood.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from a bright, desolate desert overlook into the neon-saturated depths of a futuristic metropolis. It begins on a sun-drenched road with a view of a massive floating spaceport hovering over the distant skyline, before the landscape shifts into suburban neighborhoods bathed in the warm orange glow of sunset. As night falls, the camera glides through a corporate plaza of teal-lit glass buildings and follows a red sports car around a curve, eventually ascending onto an elevated highway flanked by dense neon signage and prominent billboards. The scene then plunges into a towering downtown street canyon filled with massive digital screens and heavy traffic before passing under a covered underpass. Finally, the environment transforms into the Little China district, where the surrounding architecture is illuminated by a distinctive, immersive green neon light.
